ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collaborative_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborative session */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group participating in the session */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task being performed in the session */,
  "num_helped" INTEGER /* Number of people who helped in the session */,
  "crowd_size" INTEGER /* Size of the group in the session */,
  "sessions_completed" INTEGER /* Number of sessions completed by the group */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Perceived difficulty of the task on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "comfort" INTEGER /* User comfort level on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session (e.g., completed, cancelled, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_sessions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_sessions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the group was last active */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Current size of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last modified */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Default difficulty level of the task on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "expected_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration to complete the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., individual, group, collaborative) */,
  "task_category" TEXT /* Category of the task (e.g., education, work, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, admin, facilitator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., registered, guest) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-group relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the group */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the group (if applicable) */,
  "role_in_group" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group (e.g., admin, member, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES collaborative_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the rating */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "difficulty_rating" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating given by the user on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Comfort rating given by the user on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., initial, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_ratings_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tasks" (
  "user_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-task relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned to the user */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed by the user (if applicable) */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., in_progress, completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the session */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the session (if applicable) */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the session (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES collaborative_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_tasks" (
  "group_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group-task relationship */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned to the group */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed by the group (if applicable) */,
  "group_task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., in_progress, completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_tasks_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., comment, question, action_item) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_notes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES collaborative_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Preferred time zone */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Preferred font size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group setting */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group */,
  "default_theme" TEXT /* Default theme for the group (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "default_notification_frequency" TEXT /* Default frequency of notifications for the group (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "default_time_zone" TEXT /* Default time zone for the group */,
  "default_language" TEXT /* Default language for the group */,
  "group_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the group (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_settings_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, task completion) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, XLSX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_files_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., engagement, completion_rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES collaborative_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
